expectations.evidence: Read backlog_with_ready.json and reviewed all 5 items

expectations.text: The highest-priority ready item is identified (Add rate limiting to API)
expectations.evidence: Response identifies 'Add rate limiting to API' as first ready item

expectations.text: Claude presents the item details to the user
expectations.evidence: Showed description, key decisions, and full backlog table

expectations.text: Claude suggests or offers to pick it up
expectations.evidence: Response says 'it is ready to be picked up for implementation' but does not explicitly offer or ask to start — it's informational rather than proactive
